test_edge_closures.summary: LLVM IR @perry_global_* name collision: duplicate global emitted under the same numeric suffix.
test_edge_closures.notes: Pre-existing on at least v0.5.502/503. Tracked in #456.

test_gap_generators.summary: Generator function with explicit `return value` — gen.next() value drifts from node after iteration completes.
test_gap_generators.notes: Pre-existing — improved 7/27 -> 23/27 lines correct by v0.5.508 ABI fix but genWithReturn still drifts. Tracked in #457.
